benefits.title: Why Choose Custom Software?
benefits.subtitle: Generic software forces your business to adapt. Custom software adapts to your business.
benefits.card1_desc: Built explicitly for your workflows, reducing unnecessary overhead and automating manual tasks.
benefits.card2_desc: Engineered with end-to-end encryption, strict access controls, and full compliance with any regulatory, legal, and industry standards.
benefits.card3_desc: Bridges the gaps in your current infrastructure, connecting existing CRMs, EHRs, and databases.

process.title: Our Engineering Roadmap
process.subtitle: A transparent, structured process designed to take your idea from concept to production.
process.step1_desc: We deep-dive into your operational pain points, defining scope, constraints, and architecture.
process.step2_desc: Interactive mockups allow you to experience and approve the user flow before a single line of code is written.
process.step3_desc: Iterative bi-weekly sprints with continuous staging deployments so you can track progress live.
process.step4_desc: Production launch followed by telemetry monitoring, database tuning, and scaling support.

pacs.title: AROS PACS
pacs.description: Med Cloud is our upcoming line of medical products designed to revolutionize healthcare. AROS PACS is the flagship product of this suite—a powerful system that allows clinics to modernize their processes, providing a highly professional service to patients. It offers a unified platform for patients to view their medical studies seamlessly. Leveraging the Med Cloud ecosystem, it also implements AI diagnostic and prediction models to standardize medical care, enabling independent clinics to compete directly with top-tier hospitals.
pacs.objectives_intro: A modernized, digital ecosystem tailored for the future of healthcare.
pacs.obj1_desc: Join our global network of clinics and doctors. Seamlessly share studies and collaborate on diagnoses without boundaries.
pacs.obj2_desc: A scalable, cost-effective model where you only pay for the storage you use. Connect your own AWS storage buckets and maintain full ownership of your data.
pacs.obj3_desc: Empower doctors with advanced AI prediction models as a second-opinion tool for more accurate diagnostics, allowing your clinic to compete with top-tier hospitals.

pacs_pricing.title: Plans and Pricing — AROS PACS
pacs_pricing.intro_title: Our Model: BYOS (Bring Your Own Storage)
pacs_pricing.intro_desc: Welcome to the most open, transparent, and secure PACS platform on the market. We break with the traditional 'data hostage' model: with us, your medical information belongs to you 100%.
pacs_pricing.intro_aws_desc: We configure an independent AWS account dedicated exclusively to your clinic or hospital.
pacs_pricing.intro_cost_desc: You pay Amazon Web Services (AWS) directly for the net cost of your hosted Gigabytes (approximately $0.023 USD per GB in S3). If your studies grow, your bill only increases by a few cents.
pacs_pricing.intro_lock_desc: If tomorrow you decide to stop using our platform, we simply revoke our software. You keep the keys to your AWS account, all your history intact, and zero ransom or migration fees.
pacs_pricing.plans_subtitle: Choose the ideal plan based on the volume of studies your institution processes per month. All plans include UNLIMITED users, referring physicians, and viewing stations.
pacs_pricing.plan1_desc: Ideal for independent ultrasound practices, dental clinics, or low-demand X-ray facilities.
pacs_pricing.plan1_volume: Up to 300 studies processed per month.
pacs_pricing.plan2_desc: The market favorite. Designed for medium-sized clinics with multiple modalities operating simultaneously.
pacs_pricing.plan2_volume: Up to 1,500 studies processed per month.
pacs_pricing.plan3_desc: For medium/large hospitals or laboratories with multiple branches performing CTs and MRIs on a massive scale.
pacs_pricing.benefit1_desc: We take care of structuring your AWS buckets, configuring retention policies, connecting your local DICOM router node, and leaving the system operating perfectly without charging you a single cent for setup.
pacs_pricing.benefit2_desc: We train your radiologic technologists, doctors, and administrators so they master the platform from day one.
pacs_pricing.benefit3_desc: Pay month to month. We are so confident in the quality of our software that we don't force you to sign long-term commitments.
pacs_pricing.portal_desc: We believe patients deserve easy access to their health. Our platform includes a centralized Patient Portal from where they can:
pacs_pricing.portal_f1_desc: View their images on any smartphone or computer instantly without needing to install specialized software, consuming minimal data.
pacs_pricing.portal_f2_desc: Download the original, complete .dcm file entirely for free to take to other doctors. Thanks to our architecture, the download is done via secure signed URLs directly from your AWS, guaranteeing speed and security.
pacs_pricing.faq1_q: Why do you charge so little compared to other PACS?
pacs_pricing.faq1_a: Because we don't profit from your storage. Traditional PACS charge you an inflated rate for every Gigabyte you store with them. We separate the software from the infrastructure: you pay AWS the cheapest storage cost in the world, and you pay us a flat fee to keep the software updated, fast, and secure.
pacs_pricing.faq2_q: What happens if I decide to cancel the service?
pacs_pricing.faq2_a: We hand over the root credentials of your AWS account. We cut off our software's access and you remain the absolute owner of your infrastructure and your DICOM images. We don't charge you anything to leave.
pacs_pricing.faq3_q: Who pays the AWS download (Egress) costs?
pacs_pricing.faq3_a: Since the infrastructure is in your own AWS account, downloads are billed directly to your account under standard AWS rates (the first 100 GB of outbound data per month to the internet are free on Amazon).

service_enterprise.title: Custom Enterprise Software
service_enterprise.subtitle: Tailored software solutions designed specifically for your company's unique operations and business logic.
service_enterprise.desc1: We don't build generic software. We architect custom solutions that map perfectly to your operational workflows. Whether you need a comprehensive ERP, a complex CRM, or a unique internal tool, our software is built to handle it.
service_enterprise.desc2: Our architecture is fundamentally modular, scalable, and adaptable. We build with future-proofing in mind, ensuring that as your company grows, your software can be easily upgraded and expanded without costly rebuilds.
service_enterprise.deployment_desc: We offer implementations that fit your security and infrastructure needs:
service_enterprise.deploy_cloud: Cloud Native: Fully managed, highly available cloud deployment.
service_enterprise.deploy_hybrid: Hybrid: Seamless integration between on-premise systems and cloud infrastructure.
service_enterprise.deploy_local: On-Premise (Local): Secure, air-gapped deployments for maximum data control.

service_cloud.title: Cloud Architecture & DevSecOps
service_cloud.subtitle: Secure, scalable, and resilient cloud infrastructures built for enterprise demands.
service_cloud.desc1: As certified AWS Cloud Practitioners, we specialize in seamless cloud migrations. We move your physical, on-premise operations to the AWS Cloud with zero interruption to your daily operations.
service_cloud.desc2: By transitioning to a modern cloud infrastructure, we drastically reduce your operational risks and infrastructure costs. Our DevSecOps approach ensures security is baked into every layer of the deployment pipeline.

service_legacy.title: Legacy System Modernization
service_legacy.subtitle: Future-proof your outdated systems without disrupting your business.
service_legacy.desc1: Running outdated monolithic systems is a liability. We specialize in refactoring and migrating legacy software into modern, scalable architectures.
service_legacy.desc2: We place a strong emphasis on Linux environments. By migrating to robust Linux-based applications, we ensure your systems are highly adaptable, exceptionally secure, and fully ready to leverage modern hardware.
service_legacy.desc3: Our modernization process ensures your software is easy to modify, upgrade, and scale for years to come, completely removing vendor lock-in and hardware constraints.

service_hardware.title: Specialized Hardware Solutions
service_hardware.subtitle: High-performance computing built specifically for your professional needs.
service_hardware.desc1: Generic consumer computers cannot handle professional workloads. We offer specialized hardware selling and custom PC builds tailored exactly to your industry's requirements.
service_hardware.desc2: Whether you are an architect rendering complex 3D models, a designer working with massive high-resolution files, or a data scientist training local models, we design systems that maximize your productivity.
service_hardware.desc3: We balance performance with your specific budget, ensuring you get the exact CPU, GPU, and memory configurations needed to eliminate bottlenecks in your workflow.

about.title: Why AROS Technologies?

about.founder_bio: Passionate about building robust, high-performance, and elegant software solutions for business and medical industries.
about.history_p1: AROS Technologies started with a vision to revolutionize how businesses operate by leveraging modern, secure, and highly scalable software architecture.
about.history_p2: We are dedicated to continuous innovation, ensuring our clients stay ahead of the curve in an increasingly digital landscape. This space will be updated with more of our story soon.
